lineid_timedesc_supplement.note: Only explicit headway_minutes/interval_time from AMap lineid timedesc was added; no missing frequency was estimated. Main regularized CSV was locked, so complete supplemented version was written as sidecar.

method_summary.reference_basis: nearby regular routes by numeric route id when possible; otherwise same route-category observed medians; otherwise explicit category defaults
method_summary.first_last_time_basis: AMap line start_time/end_time when available; otherwise route category defaults with night/school/commuter hints
method_summary.no_direct_source_claim: These are estimates, not operator-published schedules.

missing_regularized_estimate_supplement.annotation: These rows repair queries that had headers/rules but no regularized timetable entries. All rows are marked as estimates, not observed/operator-published timetables.
